title: caprifolium pileatum
intro: Caprifolium pileatum, also known as the Pygeum or African plum, is a plant species belonging to the family of flowering plants in the order Dipsacales. Traditionally, the bark of Caprifolium pileatum has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to support prostate health, reduce the risk of urinary tract infections, and alleviate symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia. Caprifolium pileatum can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, or extracts for consumption.
